name: Boon Industries Inc.
summary: Boon Industries Inc. develops, manufactures, and markets specialty water-soluble ingredients with proprietary formulations for the food, beverage, and nutraceutical industries in the United States and internationally. The company offers H+, a water-soluble hemp extract ingredient, which I used in a series of formulations marketed as Sleep, Relax, and Energy; M+, a water-based mineral supplement and electrolyte concentrate that delivers magnesium, potassium, sodium, and calcium; and DiOx+, an acting biocide that does not form any toxic by-products and leaves no residual toxicity. Boon Industries Inc. is based in Grass Valley, California.
